workItem.title: Resume review lookups after provider cooldown without rerunning Codex
workItem.body:

## Context

A completed bos-front implementation and reviewer stage consumed millions of tokens, then the AgentRun exited because the durable Review lookup encountered the process-wide game-api rate-limit circuit. The scheduler would restart the broader issue even though the workspace and model output were valid.

## Expected outcome

Transient provider cooldowns pause only the current review lookup, preserve the completed Codex stage, and resume from durable artifacts without opening another reviewer or implementation session.

## Scope

- Retry Review artifact lookups inside DeliveryCoordinator for normalized game_api_rate_limited responses
- Honor the shared circuit retry interval without spinning
- Keep retry count bounded and configurable
- Preserve the same workspace, AgentRun, Attempt and completed reviewer session
- Cover the exact 743-second production cooldown scenario without real test sleeps

## Out of scope

- Bypassing provider rate limits
- Keeping unbounded in-memory retries for arbitrary errors
- Re-running Codex solely to poll GitHub

## Acceptance criteria

- A rate-limited Review lookup waits and retries the lookup only
- The completed reviewer session is not started again
- The delivery finalizer continues after the durable artifact becomes readable
- Non-rate-limit errors still fail closed
- The full Symphony gate passes with 100 percent coverage and zero Dialyzer findings
